hooks.command: if [ -f CLAUDE.md ]; then echo '--- DIVAN DEVRALMA SOZLESMESI ---'; head -40 CLAUDE.md; fi; if [ -f .divan/progress.md ]; then echo '--- DEFTER: kaldigin yer ---'; head -40 .divan/progress.md; elif [ -f BLUEPRINT.md ]; then echo '--- BLUEPRINT ozeti ---'; head -30 BLUEPRINT.md; fi; true
